title: fast auto totem
description: Automatically re-equips a Totem of Undying after it pops, using a realistic human-like delay (400–650ms). Lightweight, client-side, and designed to feel natural instead of instant.
body:
A lightweight client-side mod that automatically equips a Totem of Undying after it pops — with a realistic human-like delay.

## ✨ Features:
- Auto re-equip totem after pop
- Random delay (400–650ms) to simulate human reaction
- Inventory smart search (hotbar priority)
- Lightweight and optimized

## ⚙️ Why this mod?
Most autototem mods are instant and unnatural. This one mimics real player behavior for a more legit feel.

## 🧠 Optional features:
- Configurable delay
- Combat-only mode

## 🛠️ Requirements:
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Minecraft 1.21.4

## 💡 Client-side only
